summary: Comprehensive testing of TrustLens Auth & Signal Trend Tracking features completed successfully. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed covering registration, login, /me endpoint, link-analysis, my-analyses, and signal-trends endpoints. Frontend: Verified via Playwright - Auth modal with 'Optional. Your analysis can still be used anonymously.' message, My Analyses page with login flow, landing page 'My Analyses' link for logged-in users, and Signal Strength section with TrendingUp/TrendingDown delta indicators.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates account and returns user_id, email, token
Backend: POST /api/auth/register returns 409 for duplicate email
Backend: POST /api/auth/register returns 400 for password < 6 chars
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns token for valid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for non-existent email
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user profile with valid token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 with invalid token
Backend: POST /api/auth/link-analysis links session and creates signal snapshot
Backend: POST /api/auth/link-analysis returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/auth/my-analyses returns list of user's linked analyses
Backend: GET /api/auth/my-analyses returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/auth/signal-trends/{session_id} returns has_previous=false for first analysis
Backend: GET /api/auth/signal-trends/{session_id} returns trends with delta values for second+ analysis
Backend: GET /api/auth/signal-trends/{session_id} returns 401 without auth
Backend: Existing test account (test@trustlens.com/secure123) works correctly
Backend: Test account has >= 2 linked analyses as expected
Frontend: ResultsDashboard shows soft save prompt at stage 12 with data-testid='save-analysis-prompt'
Frontend: Save prompt shows 'Optional. Your analysis can still be used anonymously.' text
Frontend: AuthModal opens when non-logged-in user accesses /my-analyses
Frontend: AuthModal shows 'Optional. Your analysis can still be used anonymously.' message
Frontend: /my-analyses page shows analysis history for logged-in users (3 analyses found)
Frontend: Landing page shows 'My Analyses' nav link for logged-in users
Frontend: Signal Strength Summary shows trend deltas (TrendingUp +50% for phone_secrecy)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py lines 1654-1815: Auth endpoints (register, login, me, link-analysis, my-analyses, signal-trends) correctly implemented with JWT authentication via passlib bcrypt
Backend correctly generates signal_snapshots when analysis is linked, enabling trend comparison
Frontend ResultsDashboard.jsx lines 1421-1454: Save prompt correctly appears at revealStage >= 12 with proper messaging
Frontend ResultsDashboard.jsx lines 800-831: Signal trends correctly rendered with TrendingUp (red, +delta) and TrendingDown (green, -delta) indicators
Frontend AuthModal.jsx line 136: 'Optional. Your analysis can still be used anonymously.' text present
Frontend MyAnalyses.jsx: Correctly shows auth modal for non-logged-in users and displays analysis history after login

test_credentials.notes: This account has 3 linked analyses with signal snapshots for trend testing

seed_data_creation: Test used existing test account (test@trustlens.com) with 3 linked analyses. New TEST_ prefixed users created during pytest for isolation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth and Signal Trend features fully tested. Backend endpoints at https://relationship-pulse-7.preview.emergentagent.com/api/auth/*. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_auth_and_trends.py (18 tests). JWT tokens use HS256 with dynamic secret per pod. Signal trends compare current analysis with immediately previous one - delta values show percentage change. Frontend ResultsDashboard reveals content in 12 stages - save prompt appears at stage 12 (after ~12 seconds). TrendingUp icons shown for positive deltas (red #FF4D6D), TrendingDown for negative (green #6EE7B7).

auth_endpoints.register: POST /api/auth/register - creates account, returns user_id, email, token
auth_endpoints.link_analysis: POST /api/auth/link-analysis - links session to user, creates signal_snapshot
auth_endpoints.my_analyses: GET /api/auth/my-analyses - returns user's linked analyses with signal_count
auth_endpoints.signal_trends: GET /api/auth/signal-trends/{session_id} - returns has_previous, trends with delta/direction

save_prompt.message: Optional. Your analysis can still be used anonymously.

auth_modal.optional_message: Optional. Your analysis can still be used anonymously.
